title: egr Cooler Delete for for M47N2 M57N2 Diesel Engines, EGR Delete Removal Replacement for E87 E90 E91 E92 E93 E60 E61 E83 E70, Technical References 11717804381 and 117177920032 UK
features: Compatibility and technical applications: Designed for M47N2 and M57N2 diesel engines, this kit fits 1 Series E87, 3 Series E90/E91/E92/E93, 5 Series E60/E61, X3 E83, X5 E70 and other models produced between 2002 and 2012. 0. Replaces technical numbers 11717804381 and 11717792077.

High Performance Materials: Made of machined aluminum and corrosion-resistant stainless steel, with high temperature seals stabilized at 250°C. Reinforced structure with 5mm locking plates and heat-treated fixings for durability in extreme conditions.

Functional Benefits: Eliminates failures of the original EGR system by removing flexible ducts prone to cracks. Optimises turbo response (lag reduction), improves combustion and reduces clogging of intake manifolds. Contributes to better fuel economy and prolongs engine life.
Professional Installation: Requires advanced mechanical skills for complete EGR system removal and mounting of armor plates. No guide provided
Model exclusions: Not suitable for petrol vehicles. Check technical reference match before installation.
description: This item is for diesel vehicles only, not petrol vehicles.
